cities.description: Meet the most famous landmarks in a bright and busy city.

landmarks.name: Statue of Liberty
landmarks.story: Big Cat arrives by boat and sees a giant green lady holding a torch, as if she is saying, 'Welcome to New York!'
landmarks.mission: Raise your hand like a torch and say, 'Welcome!'

landmarks.name: Empire State Building
landmarks.story: Big Cat looks up and up and up. The building is so tall it almost tickles the clouds.
landmarks.mission: Stand tall and stretch up high.

landmarks.name: Times Square
landmarks.story: At night, Big Cat sees giant screens and sparkling lights everywhere. The city feels bright and awake.
landmarks.mission: Twinkle your fingers like city lights.

cities.description: Explore a big state with cowboys, boots, and ranch adventures.

landmarks.name: Cowboy Ranch
landmarks.story: Big Cat visits a ranch and sees cowboys riding horses across the dusty land.
landmarks.mission: Pretend to ride a horse and say, 'Yeehaw!'

landmarks.name: Cactus Desert
landmarks.story: In the hot Texas sun, Big Cat finds tall cacti standing proudly like green guards.
landmarks.mission: Freeze like a cactus.

landmarks.name: Texas Star
landmarks.story: Big Cat learns that Texas is called the Lone Star State and finds stars everywhere.
landmarks.mission: Make a big star shape with your arms and legs.

cities.description: Walk through a famous school town full of books, ideas, and clever questions.

landmarks.name: Harvard Yard
landmarks.story: Big Cat tiptoes through a beautiful campus where students read, think, and dream big.
landmarks.mission: Open an imaginary book and say, 'Let’s learn!'

landmarks.name: Library
landmarks.story: Inside the library, Big Cat finds rows and rows of books waiting to share their secrets.
landmarks.mission: Whisper, 'Shhh,' and turn pretend pages.

landmarks.name: Science Lab
landmarks.story: Big Cat becomes a little scientist and asks, 'What happens next?'
landmarks.mission: Put on pretend goggles and say, 'Let’s discover!'

cities.description: Enjoy sunny weather, exciting rides, and magical fun.

landmarks.name: Disney World
landmarks.story: Big Cat enters a magical park full of castles, songs, and smiling characters.
landmarks.mission: Wave like you are in a parade.

landmarks.name: Beach
landmarks.story: Big Cat runs on the warm sand and splashes near the shiny blue sea.
landmarks.mission: Pretend to swim and splash.

landmarks.name: Orange Grove
landmarks.story: Big Cat picks juicy oranges and smells the sweet sunshine in the air.
landmarks.mission: Pretend to pick an orange from a tree.

cities.description: Discover a city with steep roads, a famous bridge, and ocean views.

landmarks.name: Golden Gate Bridge
landmarks.story: Big Cat sees a giant red bridge stretching across the water like a long ribbon.
landmarks.mission: Make a bridge shape with your arms.

landmarks.name: Cable Car
landmarks.story: Big Cat hops on a cable car and rattles up and down the steep streets.
landmarks.mission: Rock side to side like a moving cable car.

landmarks.name: Fisherman’s Wharf
landmarks.story: At the harbor, Big Cat hears sea lions barking and smells salty ocean air.
landmarks.mission: Clap like sea lion flippers.

cities.description: Visit fields, farms, and delicious food from the countryside.

landmarks.name: Corn Field
landmarks.story: Big Cat walks through tall corn that swishes and whispers in the wind.
landmarks.mission: Sway your body like corn in the breeze.

landmarks.name: Barn
landmarks.story: Big Cat opens the barn door and finds hay, animals, and busy farm sounds.
landmarks.mission: Moo, oink, and cluck like farm animals.

landmarks.name: Ice Cream Factory
landmarks.story: After the farm visit, Big Cat enjoys a cold, sweet ice cream treat.
landmarks.mission: Pretend to lick an ice cream cone.

cities.description: Feel the rhythm of a musical city full of color and joy.

landmarks.name: Jazz Street
landmarks.story: Big Cat hears trumpets, drums, and happy music filling the air.
landmarks.mission: March and clap to a jazz beat.

landmarks.name: French Quarter
landmarks.story: Big Cat walks past colorful balconies and lively old streets.
landmarks.mission: Wave your arms like dancing ribbons.

landmarks.name: Alligator Swamp
landmarks.story: In the quiet swamp, Big Cat spots an alligator gliding slowly through the water.
landmarks.mission: Creep slowly like an alligator.

cities.description: Meet famous places that tell the story of the nation.

landmarks.name: White House
landmarks.story: Big Cat stands in front of a big white house where important leaders work.
landmarks.mission: Stand proudly and wave like a leader.

landmarks.name: Lincoln Memorial
landmarks.story: Big Cat looks up at a giant seated statue that feels calm, strong, and wise.
landmarks.mission: Sit still like a statue.

landmarks.name: Washington Monument
landmarks.story: Big Cat sees a tall pointed monument reaching straight into the sky.
landmarks.mission: Point up and say, 'So tall!'

cities.description: Travel through forests, mountains, and sweet maple adventures.

landmarks.name: Maple Tree Forest
landmarks.story: Big Cat walks through red and orange leaves and finds sweet maple trees.
landmarks.mission: Flutter down like a falling leaf.

landmarks.name: Maple Syrup Farm
landmarks.story: Big Cat watches sap drip slowly and turn into golden syrup.
landmarks.mission: Pretend to pour syrup on pancakes.

landmarks.name: Mountain Trail
landmarks.story: Big Cat hikes up a trail and breathes cool, fresh mountain air.
landmarks.mission: March uphill with strong steps.

cities.description: Explore a cool northern place full of lakes, snow, and outdoor fun.

landmarks.name: Frozen Lake
landmarks.story: Big Cat sees a lake sparkling like glass under the cold winter sky.
landmarks.mission: Slide gently like you are skating.

landmarks.name: Snowy Forest
landmarks.story: Snow falls softly as Big Cat tiptoes through the quiet white woods.
landmarks.mission: Catch pretend snowflakes in your hands.

landmarks.name: Winter Cabin
landmarks.story: Inside the warm cabin, Big Cat feels cozy after the chilly outdoor adventure.
landmarks.mission: Wrap your arms around yourself and say, 'Cozy!'

cities.theme: Ice, Animals, and the Great Wild
cities.description: Journey to a giant snowy land with glaciers and amazing animals.

landmarks.name: Glacier
landmarks.story: Big Cat stares at a giant wall of blue ice that glows in the sunlight.
landmarks.mission: Freeze like a glacier statue.

landmarks.name: Polar Bear Land
landmarks.story: Big Cat spots a fluffy polar bear walking carefully across the snow.
landmarks.mission: Walk slowly like a big polar bear.

landmarks.name: Northern Lights
landmarks.story: At night, colorful lights dance across the sky like magic ribbons.
landmarks.mission: Wave scarves or arms like dancing lights.

cities.description: Step into a world of stars, cameras, and movie magic.

landmarks.name: Hollywood Sign
landmarks.story: Big Cat looks up at giant white letters standing proudly on the hill.
landmarks.mission: Make a big pose and smile like a star.

landmarks.name: Movie Studio
landmarks.story: Cameras roll, lights shine, and Big Cat pretends to be the hero of a new film.
landmarks.mission: Say, 'Action!' and strike a pose.

landmarks.name: Walk of Fame
landmarks.story: Big Cat follows the shiny stars on the ground and dreams of becoming famous.
landmarks.mission: Walk carefully from star to star.
